item.title: A message from Mr. D'Alessio:
item.description: Members of the Drama Club are reminded to meet tomorrow at lunch in Rm.209

item.title: A message from the Guidance Office:
item.description: This is a reminder for all Grade 12 students who have outstanding community service hours to submit. The deadline to submit for Graduation is two weeks away, May 19th! You must have all volunteer hours submitted in order to attend Prom. As well, you need to be aware that the last possible day to have a prom ticket refunded is this Friday. So please submit your hours as soon as possible!

item.title: Another message from Guidance Office for Grade 12 students -
item.description: The fee for the Grade 12 Graduation Ceremony is currently available in school cash online. The due date for the Graduation fee is May 22. Please submit through school cash online as soon as possible. Thank you!

item.title: The last message from Guidance today -
item.description: St. Mother Teresa school is looking for Grade 10 student volunteers to help with a Grade 6 Graduation Party. The event takes place on Saturday, June 20th from 5 to 9 p.m. at the hall above Russell Arena.If you’re interested or want more details, please see Ms. Timmins.

item.title: A message from Mme. Perron.
item.description: There will be a very quick Europe Team Meeting today at lunch in room 125. All travelers must attend.. .This will be a very quick meeting so please be prompt.

item.title: A message from the Cafeteria-
item.description: The last day for the cafeteria to be open for the school year is May 20th
